name.label: Name
name.description: An optional label shown on the node in the editor.

provider.label: Provider
provider.description: Selects where Claude runs — Anthropic directly, or through your Amazon, Google, or Microsoft cloud account.

authMethod.label: Sign-in method
authMethod.description: Chooses how to sign in when the provider is Anthropic: an API key or your Claude subscription.

model.label: Model
model.description: Selects which Claude model to use; leave empty for the default.

fallbackModel.label: Backup model
fallbackModel.description: Selects a backup model used automatically when the main one is unavailable.

effort.label: Reasoning effort
effort.description: Sets how hard the model thinks before acting — higher means deeper reasoning and more tokens.

systemPromptPreset.label: Assistant style
systemPromptPreset.description: Chooses the built-in behavior the assistant starts from.

appendSystemPrompt.label: Extra instructions
appendSystemPrompt.description: Adds extra instructions on top of the Claude Code style.

customSystemPrompt.label: Custom instructions
customSystemPrompt.description: Holds your own instructions, used only when the style is set to Custom.

cwd.label: Working folder
cwd.description: Sets the folder the assistant works in; leave empty to use Node-RED's folder.

permissionMode.label: Tool permissions
permissionMode.description: Sets how much the assistant may do on its own before asking.

allowedTools.label: Allowed tools
allowedTools.description: Lists tools the assistant may use without asking, one per line.

disallowedTools.label: Blocked tools
disallowedTools.description: Lists tools the assistant may never use, one per line.

settingSources.label: Project settings to load
settingSources.description: Chooses which project settings files (user, project, local) to load.

maxTurns.label: Max steps
maxTurns.description: Limits how many back-and-forth steps the assistant may take; 0 means no limit.

maxBudgetUsd.label: Spending limit (USD)
maxBudgetUsd.description: Stops the run once the estimated cost reaches this many US dollars; 0 means no limit.

additionalDirectories.label: Extra folders
additionalDirectories.description: Lists extra folders the assistant may open besides the working folder, one per line.

supportedDialogKinds.label: Question types (advanced)
supportedDialogKinds.description: Advanced: lists the kinds of clarifying question your UI can answer.

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.description: Holds your Anthropic API key, used when the sign-in method is API key.

oauthToken.label: Subscription token
oauthToken.description: Holds your Claude subscription token, used when the sign-in method is a pasted subscription token.
